title: Christmas Dreams
description: Modpack for comfortable survival with a New Year's atmosphere. Give snowiness to minecraft!
body:
![CD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7383ae2f5fd8fa8ef2f9db59a21975be52dafe31.jpeg)
# Christmas Dreams
Immerse yourself in the magical winter world with our Christmas Dreams modpack! He will turn your adventures into a festive tale 🍬❄️
## _Game mechanics_
🌨️ The whole world is covered with fluffy snow, creating the atmosphere of a real winter miracle

🎁 New texturepacks add a colorful and cozy New Year's design

🌬️ New winter weather conditions! snowstorms and snowstorms are becoming commonplace

🎄 Decorative blocks, Christmas trees and gifts have been added

🦌 There are also new mobs in the world, and the old ones have acquired a New Year's look

🧣 Well, where to go without New Year's clothes!
## **📥 How to install?**
- Modrinth: Download the [modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) official app
- Other launchers: modrinth modpacks are not supported by all launchers, a list of supported launchers and how to install the modpack can be found [here](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)

❗️ Please include the Christmas hat and Default-Style Christmas texturepacks. They will add a New Year's atmosphere ❗️ (You can use the rest of the texturepacks as desired)

_________________________________________________________________________________________________
Christmas Dreams invites you to an unforgettable winter adventure, where every game is filled with the spirit of the holiday. Let your dreams come true in this amazing snow kingdom!
